meta.purpose: Machine-actionable frontier map of ECDLP formalization. Verified facts + precisely-mapped barriers. Asserts NO solution to ECDLP.

weil_pairing.mathlib_gap: No Weil/Tate pairing eₙ. Needs divisors, function fields, Miller's algorithm. Gates the MOV/Frey-Rück transfer reduction itself.

point_counting.mathlib_gap: No Schoof / point-counting; #E(𝔽_p)=n cannot be computed (native_decide can't enumerate 2^256 points). Gates the GLV [λ]-eigenvalue claim and the ℤ/n-module structure needed to instantiate the protocol algebra.

cost_model.mathlib_gap: No group-operation / oracle-query cost model, so exact Θ running times (index calculus, distinguished points) can't be stated. The generic Ω(√p) core was formalized by sidestepping this.

lattice_reduction.mathlib_gap: No LLL/BKZ/CVP. Blocks HNP / biased-nonce ECDSA attack formalizations.

semaev_polynomials.mathlib_gap: MvPolynomial exists but not the elliptic summation polynomials Sₙ (index calculus over extension fields).

quantum_cost.mathlib_gap: No quantum circuit cost model (Shor-style resource estimates). Out of scope for Mathlib.

curve_depth.mathlib_gap: Mathlib has EllipticCurve + group law, but not the deeper ECDLP constructions (higher division polynomials, torsion structure E[n]≅(ℤ/n)², isogeny depth). Partly tractable — the active Track-B DAG.
